titles.title: Afflicted saint, to Christ draw near

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Afflicted saint, to Christ draw near, Your Savior’s gracious promise hear; His faithful Word you can believe: That as your days your strength shall be.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Your faith is weak, your foes are strong, And if the conflict should be long, The Lord will make the tempter flee That as your days your strength shall be.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Should persecution rage and flame, Still trust in your Redeemer’s name. In fiery trials you shall see That as your days your strength shall be.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When called to bear your weighty cross Or sore affliction, pain, or loss, Or deep distress or poverty, Still as your days your strength shall be.
